design_philosophy: A control-room interface for bio-acoustic researchers. Extreme clarity, technical grids, and organic subjects contrasted against clinical data analysis.

layout_and_spacing.grid_system: The 'Control Room' Grid. Strict bento box layout. Base grid: grid-cols-1 md:grid-cols-4 lg:grid-cols-12. Tight gaps (gap-4 or gap-6).
layout_and_spacing.spacing_scale: p-4, p-6 for widgets. Containers with borders must have internal padding.
layout_and_spacing.surface_strategy: Grid Borders. border-collapse style. 1px borders, completely flat (no box-shadows), subtle rounded corners (rounded-sm maximum, 4px).
layout_and_spacing.alignment: Strictly left-aligned data and typography for readability.

components.buttons: Flat, sharp edges. Primary button uses primary_accent bg with black text. Hover state: slight opacity drop or inner glow.
components.cards: Flat background, 1px solid border (#232724). No shadow.
components.audio_player: Must include a visualizer (mocked via CSS animations or framer-motion) with bars that react. Use JetBrains Mono for timestamps.
components.tabs: Minimalist, no pills. Underline indicator or pure text color change on active.
components.charts: Use Recharts. Minimal grid lines, no tooltips with heavy shadows.

motion_and_interaction.hover_states: Crisp transitions. Text color changes, 1px border highlights.
motion_and_interaction.loading_states: Retro-futuristic terminal scanlines or ASCII art loader to emphasize 'AI Processing'.
motion_and_interaction.transitions: Fast, technical snaps (0.15s ease-in-out) rather than floaty organic morphs.

images.description: High resolution portrait of a Monkey

data_testid_rules: All interactive elements MUST include a data-testid attribute in kebab-case specifying their role.
instructions_to_main_agent: Build a strict 'Control Room' grid layout for the dashboard.
Use pure HTML + Tailwind for structural layouts to enable tight bento grids, use Shadcn selectively for interactive elements like Select or Tabs.
Implement an audio player with a mocked waveform visualizer.
Display the selected animal's image prominently using the provided asset URLs.
Ensure the layout feels dense and technical. Do NOT use soft shadows or heavy radiuses.
For the AI interpretation component, use a typing animation or a distinct text style to highlight the translation.
Do NOT use standard SaaS blue. Rely heavily on the deep background and neon/warm accents for interactive elements.
